# Project Alpha Plan

## Timeline
Phase 1 development begins in January with core infrastructure. Phase 2 delivery is targeted for March with full feature parity. Final launch planned for Q2.

## Resources
The team consists of 8 engineers, 2 designers, and 1 product manager. Additional contractor support may be needed for the data migration.

## Risks
Primary risks include integration complexity with legacy systems and potential scope creep from stakeholder requests. Mitigation: weekly scope reviews.
